author: y4rr
content: Observation: clamp() uses unary_map which also roundtrips on GPU. This means Huber/L1/SmoothL1 refactors won't actually eliminate roundtrips until unary_map is fixed (#480) or dedicated GPU clamp/sign kernels are added. The losses that DO benefit immediately from tensor-op refactoring are: MSELoss (sub+mul+div), BCEWithLogitsLoss (sigmoid+sub+mul+div), KLDivLoss (neg+mul+div) — because sub/mul/div/neg/sigmoid all have GPU dispatch.
